inline_comments.message: @MariosIakovidis<marios.iakovidis@huawei.com> - could you explain why this is executed only for the first PNF ready event from the batch? Is that intened behaviour?
@MariosIakovidis<marios.iakovidis@huawei.com> - due to an attempt to match pnfCorrelationId by refference the below code is NEVER executed

@MariosIakovidis<marios.iakovidis@huawei.com> - if the above attempt to compare pnfCorrelationIds in line 177 is fixed and the execution gets to this URI creation (having some non-null 'globalSubscriberID', 'serviceType' and 'serviceInstanceId') 
the URI creation fails with:
